import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      result = result
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ val: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = sorted.len()
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and val <= v
      result = list.push(result, val)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, val)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

fn intersect(_ xs: List<Int>, _ ys: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if list.contains(ys, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums1 = parse_ints(line1)
  let nums2 = parse_ints(line2)
  let inter = intersect(nums1, nums2)
  let sorted = sort_list(inter)
  if sorted.len() == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut output = ""
    let n = sorted.len()
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let v = match sorted.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if i == 0
        output = "#{v}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(output)
  end
  Ok(())
end
